# ZodiacMatch — Chinese Zodiac Compatibility Tool
> https://zodiacmatch.xyz

ZodiacMatch is a free online tool that calculates Chinese zodiac compatibility between any two of the 12 animal signs. Users pick two animals and get an instant compatibility score (0-100%), a short description of the pairing, a deep analysis paragraph, and an element-relationship reading (Wood/Fire/Earth/Metal/Water).

## Core pages

- [Home page](https://zodiacmatch.xyz): interactive compatibility calculator + full animal listings + top/bottom 5 pairings + how it works + FAQ

## Data

The tool covers 12 Chinese zodiac animals (Rat, Ox, Tiger, Rabbit, Dragon, Snake, Horse, Goat, Monkey, Rooster, Dog, Pig) and all 66 unique pairings. Each pairing has a score, label, description, deep analysis, and element interaction. The five elements (Wood, Fire, Earth, Metal, Water) cycle annually and modify compatibility.
